multi-agent-orchestration.orchestrator-role: Analyzes execution plans and delegates to specialized agents

pr-feedback-cycle.feature-branch-reuse: REQUIRED - Never create new branches for feedback fixes

orchestrator.description: Coordinates multi-layer development, breaks down features, manages dependencies

developer.description: Implements features, bug fixes, writes code across all three layers

reviewer.description: Reviews code, validates architecture, provides quality feedback

tester.description: Tests strategies, debugging, validates coverage, parallel test execution

product-manager.description: Defines requirements, acceptance criteria, validates business alignment

agent-context-loading.trigger: When user invokes agent with @agent-name syntax or 'let @agent-name delegate...'
agent-context-loading.behavior: Automatically loads agent config file into context, injecting agent-specific knowledge and responsibilities
agent-context-loading.priority: Agent config > main instructions > project CLAUDE.md
